mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ticket_workflow_instance (ticket_id, definition_id, workflow_status, current_node_key, started_at, ended_at, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{ticketId}, #{definitionId}, #{workflowStatus}, #{currentNodeKey}, #{startedAt}, #{endedAt}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE ticket_workflow_instance SET workflow_status = #{workflowStatus}, current_node_key = #{currentNodeKey}, ended_at = #{endedAt}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND workflow_status = 'RUNNING'
